message:
🐛 fix: address 5 UI feedback reports from @aashu2006 (#8027)

- #8011 ActiveAlerts wires real isLoadingData / dataError from useAlerts
  so the refresh spinner shows while data is in flight and the error badge
  lights up when the MCP bridge fails. Previously all four fields were
  hardcoded to false/0, which hid both states.
- #8012 OpenCostOverview flips isDemoData to true — the card always
  renders DEMO_NAMESPACE_COSTS, so it should show the Demo badge and
  yellow outline instead of looking like live cost data.
- #8014 fixed together with #8011 (same call site).
- #8017 Onboarding.tsx now runs every user-facing string through useTranslation.
  Questions, descriptions, options, buttons, progress label, and aria-labels
  go through t() with English fallbacks via defaultValue. Stored answer
  values are unchanged — they still use the stable English option strings
  as IDs, so /api/onboarding/responses payloads are identical. New
  onboarding.* block added to cards.json.
- #8018 replaced bg-[#0a0a0a] / bg-[#0f1218] / bg-[#111318] with semantic
  bg-background / bg-card in Onboarding.tsx and MissionLandingPage.tsx so
  those screens respect theme switches.

Fixes #8011, Fixes #8012, Fixes #8014, Fixes #8017, Fixes #8018

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,18 +58,29 @@ type SortField = 'severity' | 'time'
 
 export function ActiveAlerts() {
   const { t } = useTranslation('cards')
-  const { activeAlerts, acknowledgedAlerts, stats, acknowledgeAlert, runAIDiagnosis } = useAlerts()
+  const {
+    activeAlerts,
+    acknowledgedAlerts,
+    stats,
+    acknowledgeAlert,
+    runAIDiagnosis,
+    isLoadingData,
+    dataError,
+  } = useAlerts()
   const { selectedSeverities, isAllSeveritiesSelected, customFilter } = useGlobalFilters()
   const { isDemoMode } = useDemoMode()
 
-  // Report state to CardWrapper for refresh animation and demo badge
+  // Report real fetch state so CardWrapper shows the refresh spinner on reload (#8011)
+  // and the error badge when the underlying MCP data bridge fails (#8014).
+  const hasAnyData = activeAlerts.length > 0 || acknowledgedAlerts.length > 0
   useCardLoadingState({
-    isLoading: false,
-    isRefreshing: false,
-    hasAnyData: activeAlerts.length > 0 || acknowledgedAlerts.length > 0,
+    isLoading: isLoadingData && !hasAnyData,
+    isRefreshing: isLoadingData && hasAnyData,
+    hasAnyData,
     isDemoData: isDemoMode,
-    isFailed: false,
-    consecutiveFailures: 0,
+    isFailed: Boolean(dataError),
+    consecutiveFailures: dataError ? 1 : 0,
+    errorMessage: dataError ?? undefined,
   })
   const { drillToAlert } = useDrillDownActions()
   const { missions, setActiveMission, openSidebar } = useMissions()
